case_title: ARELLANO, SAMUEL vs. SAYRE, ANDY et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ARELLANO, SAMUEL

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-17-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC WHY PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT HAS NOT BEEN FILED, EITHER BY PERSONAL SERVICE OR BY PUBLICATION.
